system.notes: Protection Rating 50. Overload on 01-10. When the field stops damage, it converts the attack's energy into a blinding flash of light.

description.value: A rare and powerful force field generator. When activated, it converts the kinetic and thermal energy of incoming attacks into light. Protection Rating 50: roll 1d100 when hit; on a result of 50 or lower, the field negates the damage entirely. On a roll of 01-10, the field Overloads and ceases to function until the end of the next round. When the field blocks an attack, it releases a blinding flash of light.
